mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_order ( wx_order_id, order_no, create_user, schedule_id, start_station, end_station, depart_time, arrive_time, board_point_id, board_point_name, ticket_count, unit_price, total_amount, passenger_ids, passenger_snapshot, contact_phone, remark, order_status, pay_status, pay_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{wxOrderId}, #{orderNo}, #{createUser}, #{scheduleId}, #{startStation}, #{endStation}, #{departTime}, #{arriveTime}, #{boardPointId}, #{boardPointName}, #{ticketCount}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{passengerIds}, #{passengerSnapshot}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, #{orderStatus}, #{payStatus}, #{payTime}, #{expireTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wx_order WHERE order_status = 1 AND depart_time <= NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_order SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT o.*, l.station_list, s.plate_number, s.vehicle_type, -- 和上面列表完全一样的 JSON 结构 (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT( 'stationId', s.station_id, 'stationName', s.station_name ) ) FROM station s WHERE FIND_IN_SET(s.station_id, REPLACE(REPLACE(l.station_list, '[', ''), ']', '')) ) AS station_info FROM wx_order o LEFT JOIN bus_schedule s ON o.schedule_id = s.schedule_id LEFT JOIN line l ON s.line_id = l.line_id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
SELECT order_no FROM wx_order WHERE create_user = #{userId} AND schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND order_status = 0 AND expire_time > NOW() LIMIT 1
